data.name: ChatGreeting
data.value: Hello! How can I help you today?

data.name: Resumer
data.value: Full-stack .NET developer with extensive experience in developing web and business applications. Specialising in C#, ASP.NET Core, Blazor and SQL Server, I design robust, scalable and high-performance solutions. I am involved in the entire development lifecycle: requirements analysis, design, development, API integration, performance optimisation and deployment.

data.name: APropos
data.value: A passionate .NET full-stack developer, specialising in building modern web and business applications using C#, ASP.NET Core, Blazor and SQL Server. I enjoy designing robust, high-performance and intuitive solutions, paying particular attention to code quality, user experience and performance optimisation. Always keeping up with the latest technological developments, I explore areas such as artificial intelligence, automation and modern architectures to develop innovative applications that meet real-world needs.

data.name: Experience.1.Detail
data.value: Maintenance, bug fixes, and feature additions to existing Windows Forms applications for an international client.\n - Projects: payroll and accounting management, performance optimization, and process reliability.\n - Technologies: VB.NET, C#, Access, and SQL Server.

data.name: Experience.3.Titre
data.value: Developer Intern – ALFA Medical Center, Sonierana

data.name: Experience.3.Detail
data.value:
During my internship, I created a complete software application in C# using WCF and MySQL:
 - Inventory management for the pharmacy and grocery store.
 - Patient tracking to facilitate the organization and planning of care.
 - Optimization of internal processes and improvement of inventory traceability.

data.name: Experience.4.Titre
data.value: C# Developer – Personal Project: Project Evaluation

data.name: Experience.4.Detail
data.value:
Development of a WinForms application in C# that allows users to :
 - Import Excel/CSV files to analyze projects.
 - Calculate the total duration, identify critical tasks, and determine free time.
 - Create an interactive tool for project analysis and planning.

data.name: Experience.5.Titre
data.value: Web Developer Intern – Ministry of Energy and Hydrocarbons

data.name: Experience.5.Detail
data.value:
Development and maintenance of a complete web application for task tracking and management.
 - Design and implementation using ASP.NET Web Forms and C#, with SQL Server for data.
 - Responsive interface with jQuery and Bootstrap for seamless navigation.
 - Smart notifications and automated emails for task tracking and deadline adherence.
 - Optimization of productivity and efficiency for Ministry users.

data.name: Experience.6.Titre
data.value: Web Developer Intern – Ministry of Energy and Hydrocarbons

data.name: Experience.6.Detail
data.value:
Development and maintenance of a complete web application for managing correspondence within the Ministry.
 - Design and implementation using ASP.NET Web Forms and C#, with SQL Server for data management.
 - Responsive interface with jQuery and Bootstrap for seamless navigation.
 - Optimization of productivity and efficiency for Ministry users.

data.name: Experience.7.Detail
data.value:
Development and maintenance of an electronic invoicing platform compliant with the European standard EN16931 for a client based in France.
 - Development of modern and responsive interfaces using Blazor and MudBlazor.
 - Integration and consumption of REST APIs in C#.
 - Implementation of business rules related to electronic invoicing.
 - Performance optimization, user experience improvement, and bug fixes.

data.name: Projet.1.Resumer
data.value: Full development of a responsive portfolio website designed to showcase my profile as a .NET Full Stack developer. The project includes a modern interface, multilingual support (French/English), a dynamic contact form, a content management system, and various SEO optimisations to improve visibility on search engines.

data.name: Projet.1.Detail
data.value: Design and development of a modern personal portfolio to showcase my skills, professional experience, completed projects and contact details. The application is built using Blazor and focuses on performance, user experience and SEO.

data.name: Projet.1.Fonctionnalite
data.value:
- Presentation of profile and technical skills.
 - Display of professional experience.
 - Management and presentation of completed projects.
 - Multilingual support (French / English).
 - Contact form with email sending functionality.
 - Responsive interface optimised for mobile devices and computers.
 - SEO optimisation (meta tags, Open Graph, Sitemap).
 - Light/dark theme switching.
 - CV upload.
 - Animations and a modern user experience.

data.name: Projet.2.Resumer
data.value: A desktop application developed in VB.NET with some modules in C#, designed for payroll management. It automates payroll-related processes whilst ensuring stability, speed and reliability.

data.name: Projet.2.Detail
data.value: Design, development and maintenance of a payroll management application used in a professional environment. The work focused on developing new features and improving the performance and reliability of processes to meet users’ operational needs.

data.name: Projet.2.Fonctionnalite
data.value:
- Employee file management
 - Payroll calculation and processing
 - Editing and printing of payroll documents
 - Multi-user functionality
 - Network deployment (RDP or network sharing)

data.name: Projet.3.Titre
data.value: Web Application for Task Tracking and Management

data.name: Projet.3.Resumer
data.value: A web application developed using ASP.NET WebForms (C#) that enables users to plan, track and manage tasks efficiently. It includes an email notification system to ensure proactive monitoring and adherence to deadlines.

data.name: Projet.3.Detail
data.value: This web application has been designed to optimise task tracking and management within a professional environment. It allows users to create, organise and track their tasks with specific deadlines, whilst ensuring automated follow-up via email notifications.\n The interface, developed using Bootstrap and jQuery, ensures a smooth and responsive user experience. Integration with SQL Server ensures reliable, centralised data management.\n The automatic notification system alerts users to overdue tasks or those approaching their deadline, thereby improving team productivity and responsiveness.

data.name: Projet.3.Fonctionnalite
data.value:
📝 Create and manage tasks
 📅 Track due dates
 🔄 Update task statuses in real time
 🔔 Automatic notifications and email alerts
 📊 Tracking progress
 👥 Multi-user management
 🔎 Filtering and searching for tasks

data.name: Projet.4.Resumer
data.value: Development of a desktop application in C# WinForms using WCF and MySQL, designed to centralise stock management and patient monitoring in order to improve internal organisation and the quality of care within the medical center.

data.name: Projet.4.Detail
data.value:
This application was designed to modernise the internal management of the ALFA Medical Centre by centralising operations relating to stock management and patient monitoring.
 The system enables real-time monitoring of pharmacy and general store stocks, with automatic alerts to anticipate stock-outs and minimise wastage. At the same time, it facilitates the planning and monitoring of patient care, thereby improving coordination among medical staff.
 The architecture is based on WCF for communication between modules and MySQL for centralised data storage, ensuring reliability, security and performance.
 By automating several internal processes, the application helps to reduce errors, improve productivity and modernise the centre’s day-to-day management.

data.name: Projet.4.Fonctionnalite
data.value:
💊 Management of pharmaceutical and grocery stock
 📦 Real-time monitoring of stock levels
 🚨 Automatic alerts for out-of-stock or low stock items
 👨‍⚕️ Patient tracking and organisation
 📅 Scheduling of care and medical activities
 👥 Optimised coordination of medical staff

data.name: Projet.5.Resumer
data.value: Development of an EN16931-compliant electronic invoicing platform using Blazor and MudBlazor, integration of REST APIs in C#, and management of business rules relating to the invoice lifecycle for a client in France.

data.name: Projet.5.Detail
data.value: Contributed to the development of an electronic invoicing platform compliant with the European standard EN16931 for a client based in France. The project aims to ensure that invoices comply with regulations whilst offering a modern, intuitive and high-performance user interface. My role mainly involved designing and developing dynamic web interfaces using Blazor and MudBlazor, whilst ensuring integration with backend services via REST APIs in C#. I also helped implement and manage the business rules relating to the processing of electronic invoices.

data.name: Projet.5.Fonctionnalite
data.value:
- Creation and management of electronic invoices compliant with EN 16931.
 - Modern, responsive web interfaces (Blazor + MudBlazor)
 - Invoice lifecycle management (draft, approved, sent, rejected)
 - REST API integration in C#
 - Validation of invoicing business rules
 - Optimization of performance and user experience

data.name: AvailableFor
data.value: Available for freelance assignments or permanent positions.

data.name: MessageChat
data.value: Hello! 😊 I'm Rindra's assistant. How can I help you?

data.name: ProjectsChat
data.value: What .NET projects has he worked on?

data.name: AvailableChat
data.value: Is he available for freelance work?

data.name: Service.1.Description
data.value: Development of high-performance business applications using VB.NET and C#.

data.name: Service.2.Description
data.value: Modern websites and platforms using ASP.NET Core, Blazor and MudBlazor.

data.name: Service.3.Description
data.value: API integration, chatbots and business process automation.

data.name: Service.4.Description
data.value: Bug fixes, optimisation and modernisation of existing applications.

data.name: MessageSent
data.value: Message sent successfully! I will get back to you soon.

data.name: FooterDescription
data.value: From desktop to web, I develop robust, high-performance, and user-centric .NET solutions.
